content:
Employee Name: [PERSON]
Employee ID: [EMPLOYEE_ID]
Email Address: [EMAIL_ADDRESS]
Department: Finance
Manager Name: [PERSON]: [SALARY]
Review Period: [DATE_TIME], [DATE_TIME], 2022

Competency Ratings: 
Analytical Skills: 4
Communication Skills: 5
Problem Solving: 4
Teamwork: 4

Carol has been a valuable member of the finance team [DATE_TIME], consistently demonstrating strong analytical and communication skills. She has successfully led several high-profile projects, providing detailed financial analysis and presenting her findings to both the finance team and senior management. Her ability to break down complex financial data into actionable insights has been particularly impressive, and her recommendations have had a significant impact on business decisions. One area for improvement is in her problem-solving skills, where she sometimes relies too heavily on established procedures rather than thinking outside the box to find innovative solutions.

Overall, [PERSON] has had [DATE_TIME] and is well-deserving of her current salary band. Her excellent communication skills and ability to work effectively with the team have made her a go-to person for financial guidance and support. To take her performance to the next level, it would be beneficial for [PERSON] to focus on developing her problem-solving skills, seeking out opportunities to tackle complex and ambiguous problems. With her strong analytical skills and attention to detail, I have no doubt that she will continue to make significant contributions to the finance team and the company as a whole. I look forward to seeing her continued growth and development in [DATE_TIME].
